positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a bioluminescent, celestial forest scene. The central focus is a grouping of geometrically rendered, otherworldly flora and delicate, curving trunks. The composition should be symmetrical and vertically oriented, suitable for a central apparel graphic. Incorporate elements of nebula gas clouds, faint constellations, and glowing, ethereal mist around the subjects. The style must be highly graphic, evoking a fusion of Art Nouveau symmetry with modern low-poly vector art. Use a palette dominated by deep indigos, vibrant cyan, electric lavender, and contrasting bioluminescent teal. Strong, crisp silhouette edges and deep blacks are essential for print contrast. Studio lighting, zero gradient, maximal detail, print-ready digital art, perfect symmetry.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, artifacts, noise, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, lowres, poorly drawn, smudge, sketch, oil painting, photorealistic, writing
